privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a project named 'Greenfield Organics Onboarding' with a status of 'Draft', start date '2025-02-03', and end date '2025-03-14'. The project must contain exactly 6 specific project tasks linked to it. All data is synthetically defined within the task prompt and strictly checked via SQL queries in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
